author: aquariouseworkman
name: Seq4096 Muon Tuned + Sliding Window Eval
blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 trained at seq_len=4096 with tuned Muon optimizer (momentum 0.99, LR 0.020, 3/4 batch, warmdown 3000). Sliding window eval (stride=64) gives each scored token 4032 tokens of context. Post-quant sliding window val_bpb=1.1808.
